text: I tried to close the little pop up ad at the bottom of this video, but I missed, and opened up the ad, so then I went to close the tab, but I missed and opened up another tab. I tried to close that new tab, but I missed and opened up another one. This went on for several hours. Then I got frustrated and went to close the browser, but I missed and hit minimize. Then I went to the dock to un-minimize Google, but I missed and opened up Internet Explorer. My computer crashed due to IE being opened, so I went to push the power button on the tower, but I missed and got my pointer finger stuck in the USB drive. I tried to hit the power button with my other finger, but I missed and fell on the floor. I tried to get up, but I missed and hit my head on the tower, knocking me into a fatal coma. The doctors tried to revitalize me with a shot, but they missed, and then I died. Long story short, missed...

I missed.

MISSED

author: @danielvakser9993
text:
(This is a true story based on a moment in Mario Kart 7's GBA Bowser Castle 1, where Metal Mario tries to snipe Yoshi (me) and fails repeatedly and miserably. No drivers during the race, or the race itself were harmed during the grand prix.)

Green Shelled Lakitu: You think the metal plumber is causing all this?
Yoshi (Me): Not a doubt in my mind. Everything was a-ok 'till the race started and he started blowin' up drivers left and right.
Yoshi (Me): So he got a fire flower, then he fired. And he missed. And then he missed again.
Yoshi (Me): And then he fired again, and then he missed. And then he fired, and then he fired, and he missed. He missed both times. And then he fired. And he missed.
Yoshi (Me): This went on for the whole race.
Yoshi (Me): And then he fired. And then he missed.
Yoshi (Me): And then his fire flower ran out. And then he got sad. He got a banana. And then he passed out on the road.
Yoshi (Me): He woke up. Got another fire flower. And then he fired. And then he missed.
Yoshi (Me): He missed again. He fired. He hit someone, but it wasn' me. So he ultimately missed.
Yoshi (Me): He passed out again.
Yoshi (Me): Had another banana.
Yoshi (Me): He had a dream that he was sniping someone. He missed.
Yoshi (Me): He reached into the item box for another banana. He missed.
Yoshi (Me): He got a bob-omb. He fires it in my direction. But it missed. It blew up in the lava.
Yoshi (Me): Long story short? M I S S E D .
